name: 身份揭露型＋終極逆轉
description: 在全劇高潮處揭露女主的多重隱藏身份（導演M＋巴克萊繼承人），讓所有此前的壓迫和屈辱都得到回報。觀眾在等待整部劇的這一刻，揭露的規模和方式超出預期。

examples.drama_title: Reel Revenge: Divorced Director Strikes Back | Watch the full episode on the ShortMax app
examples.excerpt: So, I can't be an award-winning director because I'm a woman. What decade are you living in, Ruth? ... Everyone, I am M.
